creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


First off, please wrap your lines at about 75 columns. Your PR was 
very hard to read. Second, I have used windowmaker and cvsup for well 
over a year and never had this problem, and I just tested it to be 
sure. Try updating to windowmaker 0.65 (now in the ports) and if 
that doesn't work, try removing your $HOME/GNUstep directory and do 
a clean install using wmaker.inst. It's possible that your settings 
are hosed.
